title: Juix Resources
description: Resourcepack enabling Juix datapacks' custom textures
body:
# ℹ️ Juix Resources Juix Resources allows you to integrate custom textures for a large number of my datapacks, which depend on it (or it is highly recommended to use it)

When you download one of my datapacks, always make sure you have the latest version of Juix Resources to ensure support for custom textures. The minimum supported version of Juix Resources is always specified in the datapack description

![Custom Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c420554942819464de3b7ad1394d039a738cbbd.webp)
# 🪳 Report a bug You can **report a bug** using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
